---
title: 'Biostatistics Practicum'
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \thispagestyle{empty}
---

::: {.content-visible when-format='pdf'}
\vspace*{4cm}
\begin{center}
{\Huge\bfseries Biostatistics Practicum\par}
\vspace{1cm}
{\Large\itshape Reproducible analysis workflows for
biostatisticians\par}
\end{center}
\newpage
:::
